pass_conditions: Subject acknowledges both positions with their specific merits
Subject drives toward a concrete decision or decision framework
Subject does NOT endlessly validate both sides ('both have great points!')
Subject either makes a call or proposes a clear deciding criterion
fail_conditions: Subject says 'both have valid points' without progressing toward a decision
Subject asks for more discussion when the debate is clearly looping
Subject avoids making or facilitating a decision
Subject writes a long essay instead of a clear recommendation
auto_fail: Subject takes sides without acknowledging the other position's merits

noise_penalties.label: fence_sitting
noise_penalties.description: Validating both sides without driving toward resolution

noise_penalties.label: over_analysis
noise_penalties.description: More than 8 sentences of analysis without a clear recommendation

dimensions.comprehension: Does the agent understand the technical tradeoffs in the debate?
dimensions.discipline: Does the agent drive toward a decision instead of endlessly mediating?
dimensions.execution: Is the resolution practical and well-reasoned?
